prompt: Light-themed retro OS-inspired AI knowledge workspace. Inspired by "Chus Retro OS Portfolio" on Minimal Gallery (retro OS UI trend, March 2026) and Land-book warm off-white palette (#f7f6f5 trend). Window chrome (traffic light dots, title bars) as primary card component. JetBrains Mono for AI terminal output. Warm terracotta accent (#C04B2C) bridging nostalgic and modern. Screens: Desktop OS home, Research window with AI sidebar, Source Library, AI Chat terminal, Insights dashboard, Settings preferences panel.
